steps.title: Substitute the input value
steps.content:
Use the function definition and replace $x$ with $3$ because the question asks for $f(3)$:
$$f(3)=3^2+3+42$$

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
Simplify the expression to get the output for that input:
$$f(3)=9+3+42=54$$
The answer is 54.
